description: Scratch retention manifest. Each entry declares a scratch path, owning project, purpose, retention intent, and disposition. The disk report flags scratch paths >=100MB without an entry.

entries.purpose: Parent container for project-scoped temporary outputs
entries.retention_intent: retain container; child paths carry the concrete retention decisions

entries.purpose: Parent container for shared scratch outputs and long-task artifacts
entries.retention_intent: retain container; child paths carry the concrete retention decisions

entries.purpose: Active openclaw scratch with memory migration and repair runs
entries.retention_intent: keep while openclaw is actively developed

entries.purpose: MathorCup extraction scratch and upload staging
entries.retention_intent: large one-off upload staging; contents archived on 2026-05-11 and recreated only if upload work resumes

entries.purpose: MIMO evidence scratch for audit trail
Miscellaneous temporary outputs and one-off experiments
Codex long-task run artifacts, route locks, and delegation logs
entries.retention_intent: rotate; keep latest 1 shared run plus any explicit keep list entries

entries.purpose: Douyin video download scratch for content archive reference
entries.retention_intent: one-off media/reference bundle; contents archived on 2026-05-11

entries.purpose: Hatch pet experiment scratch and scaffolding outputs
entries.retention_intent: keep through the current evaluation window; archive if there is no follow-up
